description: Action 레이어 — Action이 정책의 기본 단위. cross-cutting category + 구체 type + 타입화된 fields + extension 참조.
imports: fields::{ActionFields, AggregationFields, GovernanceFields, HopRef, InterestRateMode, LendingFields, LiquidStakingFields, LiquidityFields, NftFields, RestakingFields, RwaFields, SettlementKind, SignFields, SignSemantic, SlippageInfo, SlippageSource, SwapFields, SwapMode, SwapRoute, TokenAmount, TokenAmountWithExpiry, UnknownFields, UtilityFields, VaultFields}

Action.doc: 정책 평가의 기본 단위. cross-cutting category + 구체 type + 타입화된 fields.

fields.name: action_type
fields.doc: 구체적인 atomic 종류 (72종). ActionFields shape 결정.

fields.name: related_target_ids
fields.doc: 이 action이 건드리는 부가 target들 (token, pool, hook 등).

fields.name: derived_from_call_ids
fields.doc: 이 action이 도출된 DecodedCall.id 목록. N:M Call↔Action 관계 보존.

fields.name: parent_action_id
fields.doc: 부모 Action의 id (Universal Router 자식 swap 등이 RouterPlan 참조).

fields.name: fields
fields.doc: ActionCategory에 맞는 타입화된 페이로드 (13 variant discriminated union).

fields.name: confidence
fields.doc: 정적 분석에서 얻은 신뢰도 (이 action 단위).

re_exports: fields::{ActionFields, AggregationFields, GovernanceFields, HopRef, InterestRateMode, LendingFields, LiquidStakingFields, LiquidityFields, NftFields, RestakingFields, RwaFields, SettlementKind, SignFields, SignSemantic, SlippageInfo, SlippageSource, SwapFields, SwapMode, SwapRoute, TokenAmount, TokenAmountWithExpiry, UnknownFields, UtilityFields, VaultFields}
